allow: PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "stopped dev server pid=$p" } else { "no server on :3000" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force; "killed stray node pid=$\($_.Id\)" })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(w, s, '| chrome%', d[w][s]['chromePct'], '| bar', d[w][s]['botH'], '| --bottom-nav-height', d[w][s]['vars']['bottomNav'], '| bars', d[w][s]['fixedBottomNavs'], '| globalBar', d[w][s]['hasGlobalBar'], '| topTap', d[w][s]['minTopTabTap'], '| botTap', d[w][s]['minBottomTabTap'], '| active', \(d[w][s]['activeTopTab'] or {}\).get\('label'\), '==', d[w][s]['activeTopTab'] and \(d[w][s]['activeTopTab']['color']==d[w][s]['primaryLight']\)\) for w in d for s in d[w]]")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);for\(const w of Object.keys\(d\)\)for\(const st of Object.keys\(d[w]\)\){const r=d[w][st];const skin=r.activeTopTab&&r.activeTopTab.color===r.primaryLight;console.log\(\\`w=\\${w} \\${st.padEnd\(8\)} chrome%=\\${r.chromePct} bar=\\${r.botH}px --bottom-nav-height=\\${r.vars.bottomNav} bars=\\${r.fixedBottomNavs} globalBar=\\${r.hasGlobalBar} topTap=\\${r.minTopTabTap} botTap=\\${r.minBottomTabTap} active=\\${\(r.activeTopTab||{}\).label} venueSkin=\\${skin} tabs=[\\${r.topTabLabels.join\(','\)}] bottom=[\\${r.bottomTabLabels.join\(','\)}]\\`\);}}\);")

PowerShell($p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($p\) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; "stopped pid=$p" } else { "no server" }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; if \(Test-Path .next\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next; "cleared .next" })

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const d=JSON.parse\(s\);for\(const w of Object.keys\(d\)\)for\(const st of Object.keys\(d[w]\)\){const r=d[w][st];const skin=r.activeTopTab&&r.activeTopTab.color===r.primaryLight;console.log\(\\`w=\\${w} \\${st.padEnd\(8\)} chrome%=\\${r.chromePct} bar=\\${r.botH} --bnh=\\${r.vars.bottomNav} actionsOverlapTabs=\\${r.navActionsOverlapPx}px bars=\\${r.fixedBottomNavs} globalBar=\\${r.hasGlobalBar} topTap=\\${r.minTopTabTap} botTap=\\${r.minBottomTabTap} venueSkin=\\${skin}\\`\);}}\);")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "STILL LISTENING pid $\($c[0].OwningProcess\)" } else { "Port 3000 free" }; "next-node procs: " + \(\(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count\))

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; if \(Test-Path .next\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "cleared .next" } else { "no .next" }; if \(Test-Path .next\) { "WARN: .next still present" } else { "confirmed gone" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c[0].OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "LISTENING pid $\($c[0].OwningProcess\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\) started $\($p.StartTime\)" } else { "Port 3000 FREE" }; ".next present: " + \(Test-Path .next\))

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\("/account","/discover","/scores"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "$u : $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; if \(Test-Path .next\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .next -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if \(Test-Path .next\) { "WARN .next remains" } else { "cleared" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; foreach \($u in @\("/discover","/account"\)\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$u" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "$u : $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "$u ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { Write-Output \("Stopping PID {0} \({1}\)" -f $p.Id, $p.ProcessName\); Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on 3000" })

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---"; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell($env:PORT=3000; Start-Process -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -WindowStyle Hidden -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\flhq-dev-out.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\flhq-dev-err.log"; Write-Output "dev server launching...")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { $p = Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Stopping PID $\($p.Id\) \($\($p.ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "No listener on port 3000." }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Output "STILL LISTENING" } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 clear." })
